prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to england and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document outlines the statutory framework for biodiversity net gain, which is specifically implemented under English legislation, namely Schedule 7A of the Town and Country Planning Act 1990, as amended by the Environment Act 2021. Therefore, it applies primarily to England.
